message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 3 nights starting from monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should be on the same day as the hotel booking and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 12:00 and should depart from leicester
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
